exampleContent.sectionSubtitle: Real prompts and articles from this template

prompts.title: Example Action Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Practical tasks to move your consulting business forward
items: Research and secure your business name, domain, and essential legal requirements for your consulting practice
Set up essential business banking and financial tracking systems for your consulting practice
Obtain business insurance coverage including professional liability and general liability protection
Create a comprehensive client intake questionnaire and discovery process to assess potential consulting projects
Create a professional brand identity package including logo, business cards, and consistent visual materials for client presentations
Establish your initial pricing structure and create standardized fee schedules for your core consulting services
